## Checklist

- [ ] Changelog updated under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-facing)
- [ ] Media synced (`pnpm sync:media`) and `public/assets` committed if assets changed
- [ ] No `out/`, `.next/`, or `.vercel/` committed
